channel.title: Gerostats
channel.description: Public health statistics with place, people and ageing kept in view.

item.title: I was born in D1. This map made that feel different.
item.description: A Newcastle Metro map story about deprivation, life expectancy and local health inequality.

item.title: The hidden week being carried in plain sight.
item.description: An interactive map of unpaid care-hours, deprivation, poor health and disability across Tyne and Wear.

item.title: The Intercensal Method: hacking Healthy Life Expectancy.
item.description: A methodological note on estimating healthy life expectancy from two cross-sectional snapshots, with MathJax-rendered notation.

item.title: The Knowledge Base.
item.description: A living reference shelf for statistical methods, software paradigms and epidemiological workflows.

item.title: Stata 101: The Epidemiologist's Interface.
item.description: A practical introduction to the Stata interface, the do-file editor and the first commands every epidemiologist should know.

item.title: Census 2021: Disability Inequality Islands.
item.description: A project note on the geographic and economic forces shaping disability prevalence across England.

item.title: Public Health Minister: The Simulation.
item.description: A teaching simulator for ageing, frailty, budgets, prevention and public health leadership under pressure.
